std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Gerageza niba URL y'inyandiko yatanzwe iri muri domaine yatanzwe.
Niba ari ko, subiza URL y'inyandiko yo kuyobora; niba atari ko, subiza URL ya domaine yo kuyobora.
Koresha protocol ya https.

Ingero:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Inyandiko ya URL y'inyandiko.
@param domain: Inyandiko ya domaine, itariko protocol.

@return Inyandiko ya URL yo kuyobora.

/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string create_private_key() {

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: Umugambi wo gukora itegeko ryo muri shell no gufata ibisohoka byaryo; umuhaye niwe ushinzwe kurekura ububiko bw'ibanga; NTABWO ukeneye gukora uyu mugambi kuko uzohabwa nyuma (ariko uyuvuge hano kugira ngo ukoreshe.

Kora urufunguzo rw'ibanga rwa DSA, uruhamagare ukoresheje imiterere ya PEM, hanyuma urugarure nk'umurongo.
Ibyerekana: kora amategeko yo muri shell kugira ngo ukore dosiye y'ibisabwa bya DSA n'urufunguzo rw'ibanga rwa DSA nk'uko bikurikira:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <dosiyeri y'igihe gito yo kubika ibisabwa> <uburebure bw'urufunguzo>`
2. `openssl gendsa <dosiyeri y'igihe gito yo kubika ibisabwa>`
Ushobora gukoresha `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` kugira ngo ukore izina ry'idosiye y'igihe gito idasanzwe kuri dosiye y'ibisabwa bya DSA.
@return Urfunguzo rw'ibanga rwa DSA rwakozwe mu miterere ya PEM, cyangwa NULL niba habayeho ikosa.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: A plan to execute a shell command and capture its output; the caller is responsible for freeing the secret storage; you DO NOT need to implement this plan as it will be provided later (but mention it here for usage).

Generate a DSA private key, call it using the PEM format, and then return it as a string.
Instructions: execute shell commands to create the required DSA parameters file and DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary parameter filename> <key length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary parameter filename>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameters file.
@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

Kora urufunguzo rw'ibanga rwa DSA, urutangire ukoresheje imiterere ya PEM, hanyuma urugarure nk'umurongo.
Ibyerekana: Kora amategeko yo muri shell kugira ngo ukore dosiye ya paramu ya DSA hamwe n'urufunguzo rw'ibanga rwa DSA nk'uko bikurikira:

2. `openssl gendsa <dosiyeri y'igihe gito yo kubika paramu>`
Ushobora gukoresha `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` kugira ngo ukore izina ry'idosiye y'igihe gito itandukanye kuri dosiye ya paramu ya DSA.

        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
